title: Brand UI Kit Library
description: Turn brand into a publishable UI library: Radix + Tailwind + shadcn used only inside brand; ship React primitives and a generated CSS bundle; FE must not depend on Tailwind.
acceptance: A library build emits React UI components and a generated CSS bundle.
Initial primitives are available: Button, Select, Card, Table, Badge, Skeleton, and Alert.
Component theme is bridged from existing brand design tokens.
Brand Studio (or a dedicated lab) can preview the primitives.
Public package exports for the UI kit and CSS are documented.
A consumer can import the components and CSS without installing Tailwind.
